overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game depicting two characters sitting around a flickering campfire in a forest clearing. The camera remains fixed throughout, capturing the warm firelight illuminating the campsite as the moon gradually becomes visible in the night sky between the trees.

events.description: full moon becomes visible in the night sky between the tree canopy branches

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the campfire scene from a fixed third-person vantage point

character wearing a hat sitting on log bench facing the campfire

entered.detail: stone-ringed campfire with active flickering flames casting warm orange illumination and smoke
wooden log serving as seating on the left side of the fire pit
wooden log serving as seating on the right side of the fire pit
large vertical tree trunk rising behind the campfire into the darkness
dense dark forest trees surrounding the clearing on all sides
bright full moon visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime campsite scene in a forest clearing. Two characters sit on opposing log benches around a central stone-ringed campfire that provides warm orange illumination. The surrounding area is enclosed by dense dark forest, and a bright moon becomes visible in the night sky midway through the segment, adding subtle cool light to the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static nighttime campsite in a forest clearing that gradually shifts in lighting as the moon emerges. It begins with two characters sitting on opposing log benches around a central stone-ringed campfire, which casts a warm orange glow across the immediate area. As the scene persists, the dense dark forest surrounding the camp remains still while the night sky begins to change. The atmosphere then transforms as a bright moon becomes visible between the trees, introducing a subtle cool light that blends with the flickering warmth of the fire.
